This validates the pipeline architecture but highlights that coverage expansion is the prerequisite for further gains.\n\nRoot cause: structural coverage gap, not calibration or threshold tuning. The next iteration must either expand training data to include the 23 missing classes or filter the active class set to match fitted coverage. This validates the pipeline architecture but highlights that coverage expansion is the prerequisite for further gains.\n\nRoot cause: structural coverage gap, not calibration or threshold tuning. The next iteration must either expand training data to include the 23 missing classes or filter the active class set to match fitted coverage.
